chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1114 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.07.2025 Mr. Najab Din Rajper advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w Inspector Manzoor Ali and IO SIP Ahmed Ali *** Mr. Talat Hussain advocate files power on behalf of the respondent No.7 and states that petitioner No.1 Mst. Tatheer Zehra is minor as such she is not entitled under the law to entered into marriage. He prayed for dismissal of this petition on this score alone. Pursuant to notice Investigation Officer of Crime No.98 of 2025 registered at P.S B-Section Tando Muhammad Khan under Section 365-B and 34 PPC has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui-juris has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and no one has abducted her and the subject FIR is false and concocted one. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of petitioner No.1 he will file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C-Class. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly, however, prayed that directions may be issued to police authorities to provide legal protections to the petitioners. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to submit his final report within seven days from today before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C- Class. Meanwhile petitioners be provided due protection in accordance with law. As far as issue of under age of petitioner No.1 is concerned, that is not the subject of FIR before us and the Respondent No.7 may raise such matter before the learned Magistrate, if so desired.

Meanwhile petitioners be provided due protection in accordance with law. As far as issue of under age of petitioner No.1 is concerned, that is not the subject of FIR before us and the Respondent No.7 may raise such matter before the learned Magistrate, if so desired. J U D G E J U D G E Sajjad Ali Jessar
